privileged_info_summary: The task creates an API token named 'automation-token' for the admin user, saved to /home/ga/api_token.txt. The agent must use this token to authenticate to the Jenkins API and retrieve the list of jobs (containing three hardcoded jobs: backend-api-tests, frontend-deploy, and database-migrations) and save the JSON response to /home/ga/jenkins_jobs.json. All file paths, token names, and expected job names are consistently defined across task.json, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh.
